title: Register core study session governor MCP for kakao-study-groupbot
objective: Introduce deterministic group session governance capabilities for the Kakao study chatbot beta path.
constraints: No product runtime implementation in ai-governance.
Verdict path must remain deterministic and hash-linked.
All boundary changes require high-tier controls.

governance_rationale.need: Group-learning chatbot flow needs deterministic session-state and intervention governance beyond existing generic MCP capabilities.
governance_rationale.boundary: Only contract-level governance artifacts are added in this repository; runtime execution remains in external governed service repositories.
controls: mandatory human gate for high-tier boundary changes
runtime binding hash pinning in registry and manifest
